name: Nene
description:
"PICO I SWEAR TO GOD I WILL CUT YOUR BALLS OFF" -Nene, when her and Darnell learn that Pico basically just fucked the three of them by throwing away their shot at the big bucks

-Having a friend with benefits was a good thing... Especially when you were Nene, and had to deal with two dumbass friends such as Pico or Darnell. That friend in question? User! (Or... In this case F!y/n) EDIT: Fixed a.... VERY big typo in this bot, courtesy of the lovely user Quix who's name oddly rhymes with Kix, the cereal So this is another Nene bot since someone requested a fempov bot (even though the first Nene bot was made specifically for 'AnyPOV' so that anyone could use it) but y'know what? Fuck it, I also have another unplanned bot after this one outside of the small series I had in mind. The person who requested this didn't leave a single name to be called by except "Drizzy Rizzy with a Glizzy"... But last time I checked lesbians don't have glizzies, and by extension couldn't 'drizz' any thing with a glizzy that they don't have- but I'm no judge, you guys are just loveable weirdos sometimies kek, let's just hope I can actually write a gender specific scenario for once
creator: NisdeyCo
